name: Resuvibe Production
description: Resume & career platform with PII handling. Full-stack Next.js application requiring comprehensive architectural, code, and security reviews.
criticalNotes: ⚠️ Handles PII — security review is mandatory. Must assess auth, encryption, data access controls, and audit logging.

pendingFeedback.text: 9 APPLY findings: TypeScript strictness, XSS defense audit, test coverage gaps, auth guard documentation, data retention policy, env var validation, observability/logging, account linking UI, admin docs. 6 DEFER items for backlog.

reviewScope.architecture: System design, security patterns, PII data flows
reviewScope.security: Auth mechanisms, encryption, access controls, compliance, audit logging
